scope: PATCH /api/workspace/communication-channels/:channelId rename/description update with clientUpdatedAt optimistic version and audit behavior

behavior: CommunicationChannel responses now expose updatedAt so the web client can send a version token with PATCH requests.
PATCH accepts clientUpdatedAt and repository updates only when the stored updatedAt matches that version.
Retrying the same desired channel state from an older clientUpdatedAt returns the current channel as idempotent success without moving updatedAt or writing a duplicate audit event.

Divergent concurrent rename/description updates from the same base version produce exactly one 200 and one 409 communication_channel_version_conflict, with readback matching the winner and only one update audit event.

tests: cmd /c "set DATABASE_URL=postgres://kiss_pm:kiss_pm_dev_password@127.0.0.1:55433/kiss_pm&& node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/collaborationRoutes.db.test.ts -t \"communication channel rename\"" -> 1 file passed; 2 tests passed, 13 skipped
git diff --check on comms files -> no whitespace errors; CRLF-to-LF warning only for channels-surface.tsx
green.warning: Existing duplicate assignment.delete warning in packages/domain/src/planning/commandReducer.ts remains unrelated.

remainingRisk: This narrows communication channel rename duplicate/race/idempotency only. CRM contact/opportunity and remaining write flows still need their own exhaustive duplicate/race/idempotency evidence.
